VRecorder.ffmpegCommand: ffmpeg -loglevel quiet -stats -fflags +genpts -avoid_negative_ts 1 -f h264 -i tcp://{applicationIP}:{videoPort} -preset ultrafast -r 60 -filter:v 'setpts=PTS/50' -c:v hevc -f segment -segment_time 60 -reset_timestamps 1 -fflags nobuffer -flush_packets 1 {output_file}

AVRecorder.ffmpegCommand: ffmpeg -use_wallclock_as_timestamps 1 -fflags +genpts -avoid_negative_ts 1 -f h264 -i tcp://{applicationIP}:{videoPort} -fflags +genpts -f s16le -acodec adpcm_ima_oki -ar 8000 -i tcp://{applicationIP}:{audioPort} -c:v hevc -preset ultrafast -crf 35  -c:a libmp3lame -f segment -segment_time 60 -reset_timestamps 1 {output_file}

ARecorder.ffmpegCommand: ffmpeg -loglevel quiet -stats -use_wallclock_as_timestamps 1 -fflags +genpts -f s16le -acodec adpcm_ima_oki -ar 8000 -i tcp://{applicationIP}:{audioPort} -c:a libmp3lame -f segment -segment_time 60 -reset_timestamps 1 {output_file}

Multi.ffmpegCommand: ffmpeg -use_wallclock_as_timestamps 1 -fflags +genpts -avoid_negative_ts 1 -f h264 -i tcp://192.168.1.2:5115 -use_wallclock_as_timestamps 1 -fflags +genpts -avoid_negative_ts 1 -f hevc -i tcp://192.168.1.2:8885 -use_wallclock_as_timestamps 1 -fflags +genpts -avoid_negative_ts 1 -f hevc -i tcp://192.168.1.2:5113 -filter_complex 'nullsrc=size=1280x720 [base]; [0:v]fps = 10, setpts=PTS-STARTPTS[v0]; [1:v] fps =7.5, setpts=PTS-STARTPTS[v1]; [2:v] fps =20, setpts=PTS-STARTPTS, scale=640x720 [v2]; [base][v0] overlay=shortest=1:x=0:y=0 [tmp1]; [tmp1][v1] overlay=shortest=1:x=0:y=360 [tmp2]; [tmp2][v2] overlay=shortest=1:x=640:y=0 [final]; [final] setpts=PTS/1' -c:v hevc -preset ultrafast -crf 28 -r 60 -f segment -segment_time 60 -reset_timestamps 1 {output_file}

AVStreamerUDPDayMode.ffmpegCommand: ffmpeg -use_wallclock_as_timestamps 1 -fflags +genpts -avoid_negative_ts 1 -f h264 -i tcp://{applicationIP}:{videoPort} -c:v hevc -crf 28 -preset ultrafast -filter:v 'setpts=PTS/1' -f mpegts udp://192.168.11.255:8899
